title: Focșani、Vrancea — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Focșani、Vranceaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

FocșaniはVranceaにある人口73,868の都市です。A city in eastern Romania known for its wine production, the Union Monument marking the unification of Moldavia and Wallachia, and its strategic location.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
